dvids.title: CNO welcomes home Ford carrier strike group
dvids.desc: Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Daryl Caudle delivers remarks on the 1MC aboard the aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78), Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Bainbridge (DDG 96) and Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Mahan (DDG 72) on Naval Station Norfolk, Virginia

dvids.title: The World’s Largest Aircraft Carrier and Strike Group Return from Historic 11-Month Deployment
dvids.desc: NORFOLK, Va. — Nearly 4,500 Sailors of the Gerald R. Ford Carrier Strike Group aboard USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) returned to Naval Station Norfolk the morning of May 16, following a historic and successful 11-month deployment to the U.S. 4th, 5th and 6th Fleets. dvids.title: Ima Black 105th Birthday Celebration
dvids.desc: U.S. Sailors, assigned to Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Delbert D. Black (DDG 119), honored Navy veteran, honorary master chief, and ship sponsor, Ima Black, on her 105th birthday, recognizing her lifelong service to the Navy community and enduring support to generations of Sailor
